title: 20 warships including 2 carriers enforce Iran blockade — CENTCOM redirected 61 vessels, disabled 4
snippet: More than 20 US Navy warships including 2 carrier strike groups (USS George H.W. Bush and USS Abraham Lincoln) are enforcing the Iran blockade. Bush has 25 F/A-18E/F Super Hornets, 2 E-2D Hawkeyes, 3 MH-60 Seahawks. CENTCOM has redirected 61 commercial vessels linked to Iran and disabled at least 4 attempting to run the blockade. Gerald R. Ford CSG returning to Norfolk after 322 days deployed.
tag_reason: New detailed force disposition report for May 11 — updated vessel counts (20 warships, 61 redirected, 4 disabled), Ford CSG homeward detail
